name: NHC Communications Inc.
summary: NHC Communications Inc. provides carrier class test access and deployment solutions for copper-based telecommunications and Internet access markets. The company designs and manufactures remotely controlled physical layer cross-connect solutions for voice/data networks. Its products include ControlPoint, a non-blocking any-to-any physical layer copper cross-connect system that comprises components, including ControlPoint cross-connect switches, ControlPoint CMS remote, ControlPoint CMS software, and XPoint test access copper cross-connect products. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Montreal, Canada with additional offices in Paris, France; and Manassas, Virginia.
